title: Apodokimos Governance Specification
description: Machine-readable specification for quadratic SBT voting and proposal lifecycle (P-10)

voting_weight.description: P-10: Quadratic SBT voting weight formula

rationale.sybil_resistance: sqrt is subadditive: sqrt(n) < n × sqrt(1) — splitting identity provides no advantage

transitions.Voting → Rejected: Quorum not met OR majority No

quorum_threshold.description: Minimum % of total active SBT weight required

capture_resistance.no_token_purchases: SBTs cannot be bought; governance weight requires demonstrated epistemic contribution
capture_resistance.field_specificity: No single actor can dominate cross-field governance without expertise across all fields
capture_resistance.agpl_3_protection: Community fork must remain open; captured fork cannot be privatized
capture_resistance.on_chain_governance: Protocol changes require on-chain votes, not maintainer approval

attestation.description: Minimum field SBT score to attest to claims

proposal_submission.description: Minimum SBT score to submit proposal
